briefs.title: Council to vote on: Burnaby Lake Overpass commemorative plaque wording
briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on the exact wording for a commemorative plaque to be installed at the new Burnaby Lake Overpass, a pedestrian and cycling bridge over Highway 1. The grand opening is scheduled for April 26, 2026.
briefs.action_required: Watch the April 14 council meeting if you have input on the plaque wording before the April 26 opening.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Lake Overpass grand opening event
